title: Reconcile docs after banner revert and Program rename
objective: Update durable docs and operational state so they match the restored CSS-only banner and the homepage Program section with generic agenda content.
instructions: Review the referenced Builder result packets and the current homepage/CSS state before editing docs.
Update docs/product-specs/workshop-website.md to reflect the Program section, generic agenda content, and current non-image banner state.
Update docs/design-docs/site-architecture.md to remove the atlas-banner asset description and document the restored CSS-only banner treatment.
Update .control-tower/docs/state/current-status.md if it still claims the homepage uses a repository banner image or Schedule placeholder wording.
constraints: Treat docs/ as durable source of truth and .control-tower/docs/state as operational memory.
Do not modify product source code.
expected_outputs: Docs and operational status updated to match the current homepage.
definition_of_done: Durable docs no longer mention the removed banner image asset.
Durable docs reflect Program rather than Schedule and describe the generic agenda accurately.
Operational status no longer mentions the removed banner image implementation.
